dod_met: pyproject.toml bounds pandas as `pandas>=2.2,<4`, pyarrow as `pyarrow>=15,<25`, and requires-python as `>=3.12,<3.15`.
Existing S3 exact pins were left unchanged and the `[spark]` extra was not touched.
Root `constraints.txt` is committed with Python 3.14.0 header, regen command, and exact runtime/test closure pins including pandas 3.0.3 and pyarrow 24.0.0.
`tests/test_env_versions.py` is an offline unit test with pyproject cross-checks, constraints lock checks, installed pandas/pyarrow window checks, and negative-case window assertions.
README.md and docs/VERIFICATION.md document `python -m pip install -e ".[test]" -c constraints.txt` and drift behavior without constraints.
docs/GAP_REGISTER.md, docs/TASKS.md, docs/index.html, docs/STATE_AND_ROADMAP.md, docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md, and `.planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md` reflect GAP-018 evidence and closure.
Verified `python -m pytest -q -m unit` -> 82 passed, 10 deselected; `python -m pytest -q -m integration` -> 10 passed, 82 deselected.
Verified `python -m compileall -q src tests`, `git diff --check`, and constrained pip dry-run; dry-run kept pandas 3.0.3 and pyarrow 24.0.0.
PR #14 is open, non-draft, `MERGEABLE` / `CLEAN`; dashboard reminder check passed.
notes: Commit c27181c pushed to origin/impl/gap-018; `gh pr checks 14` reports `remind` passed.
